title: Plant of the Week: SWEET EMOTION BLAZE® Abelia
description: A fragrant flowering shrub known for its pink-white blooms and orange fall foliage. Perfect for sunny gardens and borders.

title: Plant of the Week: SUNJOY TODO® Barberry
description: A compact, deep purple barberry with glossy foliage that adds color and structure to landscapes. Drought-tolerant and low maintenance.

title: Plant of the Week: BLACK LACE® Elderberry
description: An elegant, dark purple-leaved elderberry with pink flowers. Adds drama and contrast to garden designs.

title: Plant of the Week: PEARL GLAM® Beautyberry
description: Features vibrant purple berries in fall with dark foliage. Attracts birds and provides seasonal color.

title: Plant of the Week: FINE WINE® Weigela
description: Compact shrub with deep burgundy leaves and pink flowers. Ideal for borders and small gardens.

title: Plant of the Week: PINKY WINKY® Hydrangea
description: Large two-toned blooms that change from white to pink as the season progresses. Great for cut flowers and landscape accents.

title: Plant of the Week: GOLDEN SHOWERS® Forsythia
description: Early spring shrub with bright yellow flowers. Perfect for hedges and adding early-season color.

title: Plant of the Week: BLUE MIST® Caryopteris
description: A compact shrub with blue flowers that attract pollinators. Low maintenance and drought-tolerant.

title: Plant of the Week: FIRE CHARM® Nandina
description: Colorful foliage shrub with red berries in fall. Perfect for adding vibrant seasonal color.

title: Plant of the Week: SILVER LINING® Artemisia
description: Silver-leaved perennial that adds texture and contrast. Thrives in full sun and well-drained soil.
